_demo_notice: Fictional capability descriptions for demo. Public-safe, generic phrasing.

records.value_proposition: Lets the customer keep full UI control while we handle the payment plumbing: order creation, payment invocation, async result callback, and reconciliation file generation.
constraints: Requires the customer's WeChat Pay merchant account.
The signing entity for the contract and the merchant account holder must match (subject consistency).
Refund flow requires merchant-side certificate provisioning.
implementation_notes: Standard order lifecycle: create order -> invoke wx.requestPayment -> server async notify -> reconciliation.
Daily reconciliation file is generated server-side and pushed to a customer SFTP or downloaded via API.
Sandbox keys are issued during integration.
records.sales_talk_track: We provide the payment integration as an API + SDK so you keep full control over your mini-program UI, while we ensure the payment, callback, and reconciliation flow is reliable and finance-ready.

records.value_proposition: Generates daily transaction summaries and detail lines in a customer-defined format so the finance team can reconcile without manual exports.
constraints: Format must be agreed during discovery.
T+1 delivery is standard; T+0 requires additional architecture review.
implementation_notes: Default outputs: a CSV summary and a CSV detail file per merchant per day.
Optional: push to customer SFTP, push to a customer S3-compatible bucket, or expose via API.
records.sales_talk_track: Your finance team gets a reconciliation file in their format every day, so they stop emailing exports back and forth.

records.value_proposition: Walks the customer through whether their category is allowed, what the standard shop covers, and where development is or is not required.
constraints: Advisory only; the customer is responsible for category compliance review.
Custom front-end work is scoped separately.
implementation_notes: Output is a one-page feasibility memo with a clear verdict in one of four categories: not feasible, no development needed, integration only, custom development required.
records.sales_talk_track: Before we quote any development, we tell you whether the standard WeChat Shop already covers what you need, so you do not pay for work you do not require.
